headline: $5.4M Hack Hits Gravity Bridge, Halts Operations

article.title: Cosmos-based Gravity Bridge halts bridge after reported $5.4M exploit
article.summary: Gravity Bridge was drained of roughly $5.4 million in a suspected signing key compromise, prompting validators to halt the bridge while an investigation is underway.

article.title: Bitcoin sentiment reaches most ‘lopsided positive’ ratio for 2026: Santiment
article.summary: Crypto sentiment platform Santiment warned that the two biggest spikes in social media bullishness around Bitcoin have previously been followed by short-term price pullbacks.

headline: Indonesia Boosts Export Curbs Amid $10B Trade Slump

article.title: Indonesia Advances Export Control Plan Despite Uncertainty
article.summary: Indonesia is pushing ahead with plans to centralize exports of key commodities starting June 1, casting a cloud of regulatory uncertainty over natural resource producers.

headline: CapitaLand Cuts 10% China Staff Amid Slump

article.title: Singapore’s CapitaLand Sheds 10% of China Staff Amid Downturn
article.summary: CapitaLand Investment Ltd. said its workforce in China plunged by about 10%, or 365 people, last year as the asset manager continues to grapple with a major real estate crisis in Asia’s largest economy.

headline: $800K Bitcoin Dump Funds Florida Congressional Run

article.summary: A Republican candidate jockeying to represent Florida’s 22nd Congressional District liquidated Bitcoin to help fuel his political bid.

headline: $1B Crypto Chatbots Vulnerable to AI Hacking Threat

article.title: What Is an AI Prompt Injection Attack? The Hidden Threat Hijacking Your Chatbots
article.summary: Hackers can hijack ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini with nothing but a sentence. OpenAI says the problem may never be fully solved. Here is what it is, how it works, and how to stay safe.

headline: $5.4M Drained from Gravity Bridge in Crypto Heist
